revision.text:
local hokkaido = "[[%1 Station (Hokkaido)|%1]]" local subway = "[[%1 Station (Sapporo Municipal Subway)|%1]]" local p = { ["system title"] = "[[Sapporo Municipal Subway]]", ["system icon"] = "[[File:ST Logo.svg|21px|link=Sapporo Municipal Subway|alt=The logo of the Sapporo Municipal Subway.]]", ["station format"] = { "%1 Station", ["Sapporo"] = subway, ["Nakanoshima"] = hokkaido, ["Hiragishi"] = subway, ["Motomachi"] = hokkaido, ["Ōyachi"] = hokkaido, ["Hibarigaoka"] = hokkaido, ["Gakuen-Mae"] = hokkaido, ["Kotoni"] = subway, ["Sakaemachi"] = hokkaido, ["Shiroishi"] = subway, }, ["line icon format"] = "link", ["lines"] = { ["_default"] = { ["icon"] = "[[File:Subway Sapporo%1.svg|16px|link= %1 Line (Sapporo)|alt=The logo of the %1 Line of the Sapporo Municipal Subway.]]", ["title"] = "[[%1 Line (Sapporo)|%1 Line]]", }, ["Namboku"] = { ["color"] = "00947f", ["left terminus"] = "Asabu", ["right terminus"] = "Makomanai", }, ["Tōzai"] = { ["icon"] = "[[File:Subway SapporoTozai.svg|16px|link=Tōzai Line (Sapporo)|alt=The logo of the Tozai Line of the Sapporo Municipal Subway.]]", ["color"] = "ff9100", ["left terminus"] = "Miyanosawa", ["right terminus"] = "Shin-Sapporo", }, ["Tōhō"] = { ["icon"] = "[[File:Subway SapporoToho.svg|16px|link=Tōhō Line|alt=The logo of the Toho Line of the Sapporo Municipal Subway.]]", ["title"] = "[[Tōhō Line]]", ["color"] = "0077dd", ["left terminus"] = "Sakaemachi", ["right terminus"] = "Fukuzumi", } }, ["aliases"] = { ["n"] = "Namboku", ["namboku"] = "Namboku", ["toz"] = "Tōzai", ["tozai"] = "Tōzai", ["t"] = "Tōzai", ["toho"] = "Tōhō", ["h"] = "Tōhō", } }
return p

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: importing the templates
revision.text:
local hokkaido = "[[%1 Station (Hokkaido)|%1]]" local subway = "[[%1 Station (Sapporo Municipal Subway)|%1]]" local p = { ["system title"] = "[[Sapporo Municipal Subway]]", ["system icon"] = "[[File:ST Logo.svg|21px|link=Sapporo Municipal Subway|alt=The logo of the Sapporo Municipal Subway.]]", ["station format"] = { "%1 Station", ["Sapporo"] = subway, ["Nakanoshima"] = hokkaido, ["Hiragishi"] = subway, ["Motomachi"] = hokkaido, ["Ōyachi"] = hokkaido, ["Hibarigaoka"] = hokkaido, ["Gakuen-Mae"] = hokkaido, ["Kotoni"] = subway, ["Sakaemachi"] = hokkaido, ["Shiroishi"] = subway, }, ["line icon format"] = "link", ["lines"] = { ["_default"] = { ["icon"] = "[[File:Subway Sapporo%1.svg|16px|link= %1 Line (Sapporo)|alt=The logo of the %1 Line of the Sapporo Municipal Subway.]]", ["title"] = "[[%1 Line (Sapporo)|%1 Line]]", }, ["Namboku"] = { ["color"] = "00947f", ["left terminus"] = "Asabu", ["right terminus"] = "Makomanai", }, ["Tōzai"] = { ["icon"] = "[[File:Subway SapporoTozai.svg|16px|link=Tōzai Line (Sapporo)|alt=The logo of the Tozai Line of the Sapporo Municipal Subway.]]", ["color"] = "ff9100", ["left terminus"] = "Miyanosawa", ["right terminus"] = "Shin-Sapporo", }, ["Tōhō"] = { ["icon"] = "[[File:Subway SapporoToho.svg|16px|link=Tōhō Line|alt=The logo of the Toho Line of the Sapporo Municipal Subway.]]", ["title"] = "[[Tōhō Line]]", ["color"] = "0077dd", ["left terminus"] = "Sakaemachi", ["right terminus"] = "Fukuzumi", } }, ["aliases"] = { ["n"] = "Namboku", ["namboku"] = "Namboku", ["toz"] = "Tōzai", ["tozai"] = "Tōzai", ["t"] = "Tōzai", ["toho"] = "Tōhō", ["h"] = "Tōhō", } }
return p
